title: Japanese Mille-Feuille Salad
description: A unique Japanese take on the classic French pastry, turning it into a fresh and crunchy salad.

ingredients.name: Mille-Feuille pastry, store-bought
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Mildly seasoned Japanese mayonnaise
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Fermented daikon radish
ingredients.notes: Available in most Asian grocery stores or online

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine chopped lettuce, shredded mille-feuille pastry, and thinly sliced fermented daikon radish.
2. Drizzle sesame oil over the salad and toss to coat.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together Japanese mayonnaise and soy sauce.
4. Pour the mayonnaise mixture over the salad and toss to coat.
5. Sprinkle chopped French chives over the salad.
